# Nick Rae

> Commercial pilot, FeedFare creator, iOS developer, and AI builder based in Merced, CA. Building side income through apps, prediction markets, and automation to fund flight hours toward an airline career.

## About

Nick Rae is a Commercial Instrument Multi-Engine rated pilot with 369+ flight hours, working toward 1,500 hours for ATP certification. He builds iOS apps (FeedFare, Inflection Point), runs an AI-powered weather prediction trading bot on Kalshi, and publishes aviation study materials on Amazon KDP. He documents the journey at nickrae.net.

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://nickrae.net/)
- [Blog](https://nickrae.net/blog/)
- [Flight Funded](https://nickrae.net/flight-funded/) — tracking side hustle income funding flight hours
- [FeedFare](https://nickrae.net/feedfare/) — walk to unlock your apps (iOS)
- [Inflection Point](https://nickrae.net/inflection/) — personal growth OS (iOS)

## Apps

- [FeedFare — Walk to Unlock Your Apps](https://apps.apple.com/us/app/feedfare/id6758923557) — screen time management through physical activity
- Inflection Point — personal growth OS (in TestFlight)

## Digital Products

- [The Non-Developer's OpenClaw Playbook](https://nicholasrae.gumroad.com/l/openclaw-playbook) — 163-page guide to building AI automations, trading bots, and content pipelines without writing code. $99 on Gumroad.
